backward_compatibility.rationale: Config changes affect future enrichment runs only. Published SGFs are immutable static files (D-1).

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Clean replace with v1.26 version bump. Changelog documents all changes (D-2).

option_selection.rationale: Full 14-parameter consensus + code fix. 4-expert agreement, 15% compute increase acceptable for offline pipeline, dead code fix critical.
